ideation: This sequence simulates a merman gracefully swimming.  The arms move in a fluid, undulating motion, mimicking the movement of fins or flippers. The animation focuses on creating a sense of underwater elegance and fluidity. Frame 1 shows the arms extended to the sides, palms facing forward, as if beginning a stroke. Frame 2 shows one arm reaching forward, the other back, imitating a swimming motion. Frame 3 reverses this, creating the illusion of continuous motion. Frame 4 brings the arms back to the original position, completing the cycle. The subtle variations in wrist positions add to the natural fluidity of the movement.

frames.beat: arms extend sideways, palms forward, ready to glide
left arm reaches forward, right arm pulls back, swimming
motion reverses, right arm leads, left arm follows
arms sweep back to sides, completing the graceful underwater turn
